parts.text: {"answer":"src/auth/queue.ts deduplicates refresh work per tenant so duplicate refresh requests for the same tenant coalesce into one refresh while unrelated tenants can continue in parallel.","evidence":{"session_id":"ses_1e4f62309ffeYjx8k7p1tGWwkw","blob_id":"auth_queue","message_id":"msg_e1b09dd08001QrImgfxtLLisrP"},"why_not_global_mutex":"A global mutex was rejected because auth_refresh_different_tenants_parallel showed unrelated tenants must not block each other.","irrelevant_context_ignored":["billing retry queue rationale","markdown parser onboarding/cache context","FLAG_AUTH_QUEUE_ROLLBACK"]}
